name: WallAxisPosition
summary: Position of the axis relative to the architectural component (any linear component, not only wall as the name might suggest).

enum_values.name: eCenter
enum_values.summary: Axis is in the center of the architectural component. Set the Distance property to the half of the component width!

enum_values.name: eFree
enum_values.summary: Position is defined by in the Distance property

enum_values.name: eLeft
enum_values.summary: Axis is on the left side of the component (on the +Y side). Set the Distance property to 0!

enum_values.name: eRight
enum_values.summary: Axis is on the right side of the component (on the -Y side). Set the Distance property to the width of the component!
